description_en: SASO Quality Mark — one of the recognized routes to Saber conformity for industrial products.
Product Certificate of Conformity (Saber PCoC) issued per consignment by a notified body.
Supplier's self-declaration of conformity — used for low-risk and non-regulated products.
Gulf conformity mark for products covered by GSO technical regulations (toys low-voltage etc.).
GCC Conformity Tracking System certificate (commonly required for children's toys).
Documented SASO exemption applicable to specific HS codes.
Type approval (e.g. radio-frequency devices via CITC).
Saudi certification for oxo-biodegradable plastic products.
Communications CoC issued by CITC for ICT and telecom devices.
CITC conformity approval for telecom and RF devices.
Mandatory water-efficiency labelling card (sanitary ware fittings).
IECEE CB-scheme recognition required in addition to the chosen cert route for electrical safety scope.
Product is not subject to a Saudi technical regulation — free-trade import permitted.
